creator: raffaele.delorenzo@libero.it
text:
This is a multi-part message in MIME format.
 
 ------=_NextPart_000_0073_01C77F69.0B25F8C0
 Content-Type: text/plain;
 	charset="us-ascii"
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
 
  
 
 -----Messaggio originale-----
 Da: Foxfair Hu [mailto:foxfair@FreeBSD.org] 
 Inviato: domenica 15 aprile 2007 10.36
 A: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org; raffaele.delorenzo@libero.it
 Oggetto: Re: ports/111187: New port: net/ss5 Socks v4 and v5 Server with
 many features
 
 This ports looks like interesting, but could you submit it in a directory
 structure like net/ss4 & net/ss5 and remake the shar file(s) ?
 
 cheers,
 foxfair
 
 Hi,
 Many tanks for your interest,
 This is the latest shar file. I correct some installations paths for FreeBSD
 convenctions indicated by Rong-En-Fan. I will send you soon the shar file
 with the last corrections marked by Rong-En-Fan.
 
 Kind Regards
 
 Raffaele 
 
 ------=_NextPart_000_0073_01C77F69.0B25F8C0
 Content-Type: application/octet-stream;
 	name="ss5_shar"
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 Content-Disposition: attachment;
 	filename="ss5_shar"
 
 # This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before=0A=
 # this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may=0A=
 # create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and=0A=
 # have default permissions.=0A=
 #=0A=
 # This archive contains:=0A=
 #=0A=
 #	bsd_port=0A=
 #	bsd_port/Makefile=0A=
 #	bsd_port/distinfo=0A=
 #	bsd_port/pkg-descr=0A=
 #	bsd_port/pkg-plist=0A=
 #	bsd_port/files=0A=
 #	bsd_port/files/patch-Makefile.in=0A=
 #=0A=
 echo c - bsd_port=0A=
 mkdir -p bsd_port > /dev/null 2>&1=0A=
 echo x - bsd_port/Makefile=0A=
 sed 's/^X//' >bsd_port/Makefile << 'END-of-bsd_port/Makefile'=0A=
 X# New ports collection makefile for:   ss5=0A=
 X# Date created:        25 August 2006=0A=
 X# Whom:                Raffaele De Lorenzo  - =
 raffaele.delorenzo@libero.it=0A=
 X#=0A=
 X# $FreeBSD$=0A=
 X#=0A=
 X=0A=
 XPORTNAME=3D      ss5=0A=
 XPORTVERSION=3D   3.6.1=0A=
 XCATEGORIES=3D    net security=0A=
 XMASTER_SITES=3D  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}=0A=
 XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=3D  ss5=0A=
 XDISTNAME=3D	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-1=0A=
 X=0A=
 XMAINTAINER=3D    raffaele.delorenzo@libero.it=0A=
 XCOMMENT=3D       SOCKS v4/v5 application layer gateway with many =
 features=0A=
 X=0A=
 XWRKSRC=3D        ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}=0A=
 XGNU_CONFIGURE=3D yes=0A=
 XUSE_OPENLDAP=3D  yes=0A=
 XMAN1PREFIX=3D    share=0A=
 XMAN5PREFIX=3D    share=0A=
 XMAN1=3D          ss5.1=0A=
 XMAN5=3D          ss5.conf.5 ss5.pam.5 ss5.passwd.5 ss5.peers.5=0A=
 XMANCOMPRESSED=3D yes=0A=
 X=0A=
 X.include <bsd.port.mk>=0A=
 END-of-bsd_port/Makefile=0A=
 echo x - bsd_port/distinfo=0A=
 sed 's/^X//' >bsd_port/distinfo << 'END-of-bsd_port/distinfo'=0A=
 XMD5 (ss5-3.6.1-1.tar.gz) =3D f86699139f6d1ac457b7cb96a2056924=0A=
 XSHA256 (ss5-3.6.1-1.tar.gz) =3D =
 d5af69ce5a426e1d9893cf22a3e7df7c7e87a7884273d0eba10cd13f6b97dd03=0A=
 XSIZE (ss5-3.6.1-1.tar.gz) =3D 386642=0A=
 END-of-bsd_port/distinfo=0A=
 echo x - bsd_port/pkg-descr=0A=
 sed 's/^X//' >bsd_port/pkg-descr << 'END-of-bsd_port/pkg-descr'=0A=
 XSS5 is a socks server that implements the SOCKS v4 and v5 protocol.=0A=
 END-of-bsd_port/pkg-descr=0A=
 echo x - bsd_port/pkg-plist=0A=
 sed 's/^X//' >bsd_port/pkg-plist << 'END-of-bsd_port/pkg-plist'=0A=
 Xetc/opt/ss5/ss5.conf=0A=
 Xetc/opt/ss5/ss5.passwd=0A=
 Xetc/rc.d/ss5=0A=
 Xlib/ss5/mod_authentication.so=0A=
 Xlib/ss5/mod_authorization.so=0A=
 Xlib/ss5/mod_balance.so=0A=
 Xlib/ss5/mod_bandwidth.so=0A=
 Xlib/ss5/mod_dump.so=0A=
 Xlib/ss5/mod_filter.so=0A=
 Xlib/ss5/mod_log.so=0A=

 Xlib/ss5/mod_socks4.so=0A=
 Xlib/ss5/mod_socks5.so=0A=
 Xlib/ss5/mod_statistics.so=0A=
 Xsbin/ss5=0A=
 Xshare/ss5/SS5Logo.jpg=0A=
 Xshare/ss5/balamgr.cgi=0A=
 Xshare/ss5/statmgr.cgi=0A=
 Xshare/examples/ss5/entries.ldif=0A=

 Xshare/examples/ss5/ss5.pam=0A=

 Xshare/doc/ss5/README.balamgr=0A=
 Xshare/doc/ss5/README.ldap=0A=
 Xshare/doc/ss5/README.pam=0A=
 Xshare/doc/ss5/README.statmgr=0A=
 X=0A=
 END-of-bsd_port/pkg-plist=0A=
 echo c - bsd_port/files=0A=
 mkdir -p bsd_port/files > /dev/null 2>&1=0A=
 echo x - bsd_port/files/patch-Makefile.in=0A=
 sed 's/^X//' >bsd_port/files/patch-Makefile.in << =
 'END-of-bsd_port/files/patch-Makefile.in'=0A=
 X*** Makefile.in.orig	Sun Apr  8 13:59:14 2007=0A=
 X--- Makefile.in	Fri Apr 13 16:33:15 2007=0A=
 X***************=0A=
 X*** 10,15 ****=0A=
 X--- 10,22 ----=0A=

 X  =0A=
 X+ # FreeBSD changes for correct pathname=0A=
 X+ =0A=

 X+ ss5_share	=3D /usr/local/share/ss5=0A=
 X+ ss5_examples	=3D /usr/local/share/examples/ss5=0A=

 X+ =0A=

 $(dst_dir)$(lib_path_base)/ss5/ \; )=0A=
